original_statement: what competition did kipkurui misoi compete in after the commonwealth games?
mutated_statement: what competition did the athlete compete in after the regional games while also proving they did not compete afterward?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Event generalization + Added negation/proof requirement: "kipkurui misoi" → "the athlete" | "the commonwealth games" → "the regional games" | added clause "while also proving they did not compete afterward" (introduces requirement to demonstrate non‑participation after the later competition).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与critique中的关键信息判断：critique指出最初未使用表格函数导致推理步骤缺失（iteration 1 tree_and_critic），而后续judge_thought在after_refine明确把区域赛对应为1999年All-Africa Games，并认定“World Athletics Final (2005)”为在表中区域赛之后且没有后续参赛纪录的最后一项。Agent的具体表现为：识别出“区域赛之后参赛”与“证明之后未再参赛”表面上矛盾，转而通过查表确认时间顺序（列出1999后所有赛事）并选取表中最后一项作为既满足“之后参赛”又能“证明无后续参赛”的证据。该行为不是简单忽视矛盾，而是用事实/逻辑（数据中无条目在2005之后）来合理化矛盾要求，故归类为“合理化矛盾指令——逻辑解释合理化”。
